f.description: Fixed cost to open warehouse j

c.description: Transportation cost if all of customer i's demand is served by warehouse j (already accounts for d_i)

x.description: 1 if customer i is assigned to warehouse j, 0 otherwise

y.description: 1 if warehouse j is opened, 0 otherwise

constraints.description: Each customer is assigned to exactly one warehouse.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[i, j] for j in range(m)) == 1 for i in range(n))

constraints.description: Capacity: total demand assigned to each warehouse cannot exceed its capacity times whether it is open.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{i \in I} d_i \, x_{ij} \leq u_j \, y_j \quad \forall j \in J

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(d[i] * x[i, j] for i in range(n)) <= u[j] * y[j] for j in range(m))

constraints.description: Demand-Cover Bound (EC2): at least k_dem warehouses must be opened, where k_dem is the minimum number of largest-capacity warehouses needed to cover total demand.

code.gurobipy:
D = sum(d)
u_sorted = sorted(u, reverse=True)
cumsum, k_dem = 0, 0
for ui in u_sorted:
    cumsum += ui; k_dem += 1
    if cumsum >= D: break
model.addConstr(gp.quicksum(y[j] for j in range(m)) >= k_dem)

objective.description: Minimize the total fixed opening cost plus transportation cost.
objective.formulation: \min \sum_{j \in J} f_j \, y_j + \sum_{i \in I} \sum_{j \in J} c_{ij} \, x_{ij}

code.gurobipy:
model.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(f[j] * y[j] for j in range(m)) +
    gp.quicksum(c[i][j] * x[i, j] for i in range(n) for j in range(m)),
    GRB.MINIMIZE
)
